summary: Public PulseScript docs as a static /docs section inside the existing Next 15 app: TSX server-component pages fed by typed in-repo content modules keyed against the REAL stdlib exports (Record<keyof typeof TA, DocEntry> — tsc fails the commit that changes the language without updating docs), code blocks statically highlighted by the exact same tokenizer the editor uses, every example and all 10 cookbook strategies executed through the real interpreter in Vitest so shipped docs code is proven to run, plus a ?pulse= deep link that opens /terminal with any snippet loaded. Three one-session increments: (1) docs shell + highlighter + Getting started + Language tour, (2) exhaustive ta./math./input./output reference (61+24+6 entries), (3) Backtesting/Optimizer page + 10-strategy cookbook + SEO (sitemap/robots/metadata/JSON-LD).
architecture:
**Rendering decision: TSX server components + typed content data modules — no MDX, no markdown pipeline.** Justification: (a) zero new build tooling on a React 19 RC + Next 15 stack (the repo has no remark/rehype today; MDX adds config churn and RSC-compat risk); (b) the API reference content is typed `Record<keyof typeof TA, DocEntry>` importing the real `TA`/`MATH`/`MATH_CONSTS` objects from `@supercharts/script-lang` (already a raw-TS workspace dep of web — `packages/script-lang/package.json` points `main` at `./src/index.ts` and `apps/web/features/terminal/pulse-language.ts` already imports it), so `pnpm -F @supercharts/web typecheck` FAILS in the same commit that adds/renames a stdlib function without a doc entry — markdown drifts silently, a typed record cannot; (c) every example is a string in a data module, so one Vitest runs all of them through the real `runScript` interpreter — docs code that doesn't execute fails CI. Prose for Getting started / Language tour is adapted from `docs/pulsescript-language.md` (§1–§9, §11–§13) into JSX via small prose components.

**Syntax highlighting reuses the editor tokenizer.** `apps/web/features/terminal/pulse-language.ts` already defines `pulseStream = StreamLanguage.define(...)` with keyword/builtin sets imported from `@supercharts/script-lang` (`KEYWORDS` in tokens.ts:33, `BUILTIN_NAMES` interpreter.ts:184, `PRICE_SOURCES` interpreter.ts:151). Add one export (`export { pulseStream }`), then a new pure module `apps/web/features/docs/pulse-highlight.ts` uses `highlightCode` + `classHighlighter` from `@lezer/highlight` (already in apps/web/package.json) over `pulseStream.parser` to emit `tok-*`-classed spans at render time in a server component — zero client JS per code block, and docs colors can never drift from the editor because they share one tokenizer. A scoped `.pulse-code .tok-*` block in `apps/web/app/globals.css` mirrors the exact palette hexes from `pulseHighlight` (comment #66737f italic, string #7ee787, number #f0b429, control #c792ea, decl #82aaff, buy bold #22c55e, sell bold #ef4444, etc.).

**Routes (App Router, all statically rendered):**
- `apps/web/app/docs/layout.tsx` — SiteHeader + sticky left `DocsSidebar` + prose column + SiteFooter; `metadata` with title template `%s · PulseScript Docs — SuperCharts`.
- `apps/web/app/docs/page.tsx` — landing: what PulseScript is (original language, no-repaint guarantees, deterministic), hero code sample, section cards.
- `apps/web/app/docs/getting-started/page.tsx` — first script in 5 minutes: open /terminal → Script dock → `pulse 1` header → run → inputs panel → save (`user_scripts`), using the new ergonomics (no-let assignment, colon bodies).
- `apps/web/app/docs/language/page.tsx` — full tour with anchor TOC: execution model, syntax (`pulse 1`, `#`, braces + colon form), declarations (`x =`/`let`/`mut`/`persist`/`fn`), types (`num/bool/text/none/list/record/color`), operators (incl. `[]` history, ternary), control flow, list (22) + text (13) methods, built-in series & context (§8 table), safety & limits (§12), the coming-from-Pine name map (from `docs/pulsescript-parity.md`).
- `apps/web/app/docs/reference/ta/page.tsx`, `.../math/page.tsx`, `.../inputs/page.tsx`, `.../outputs/page.tsx` — every real function with signature, param table, return shape (record fields read from `TA[k].outputs` at render time), and a runnable highlighted example. Counts from stdlib.ts: **ta.* = 61** (11 MAs: sma ema wma rma hma dema tema vwma linreg alma swma · 19 oscillators/stats: rsi stdev variance dev median percentRank cmo tsi roc mom cog change cum sum highest lowest sinceHighest sinceLowest correlation · 10 event/state: rising falling crossOver crossUnder cross since lastWhen hold pivotHigh pivotLow · 12 candle-based: atr tr vwap cci mfi willr obv cmf rvol sar macd stoch · 9 multi-output records: macdFull stochFull bands channel donchian dmi supertrend ichimoku aroon); **math.* = 24 fns + pi/e/phi**; **input.* = 6** (num source bool text select color); **outputs**: `draw line/steps/area/hist/dots/band/level/marker`, `paint bg/candles`, `mark buy/sell/note`, `alert()`, plus `onTf(tf, expr)` MTF and core helpers `nz na text parseNum repeat rgb rgba`.
- `apps/web/app/docs/backtesting/page.tsx` — Strategy Tester (marks ARE the strategy → `POST /api/backtest/script`, last 1000 real candles, realism: fees/slippage/SL-TP) + Optimizer (`POST /api/optimize/script` sweeps `input.num` ranges, deterministic, honest truncation) + what's deliberately absent (no repaint, no `math.random`).
- `apps/web/app/docs/cookbook/page.tsx` + `apps/web/app/docs/cookbook/[slug]/page.tsx` (`generateStaticParams` + `generateMetadata` from the content module).

**Content modules** in `apps/web/features/docs/`: `reference/ta.ts` (`TA_DOCS: Record<keyof typeof TA, DocEntry>`), `reference/math.ts`, `reference/inputs.ts`, `reference/outputs.ts`, and `cookbook.ts` — 10 strategies written in the NEW ergonomics (pulse 1 header, no-let bare assignment, colon bodies): ema-cross-follower, rsi-mean-reversion (draw level 30/70), bollinger-squeeze-breakout (`ta.bands(...).width`), supertrend-flip (paint candles + marks), vwap-rvol-reclaim (rvol filter), donchian-breakout, macd-histogram-momentum (`ta.macdFull(...).histo`), htf-trend-filter (`onTf("4h", ema(close, 20))` gate), atr-trailing-stop (`persist` state machine), pivot-breakout (`ta.pivotHigh` + `ta.hold`).

**Shared components** in `apps/web/components/docs/`: `pulse-code-block.tsx` (RSC: highlighted pre + client-island copy button + "Run in terminal →" link), `docs-sidebar.tsx`, `doc-prose.tsx` (H2/H3 anchor headings, param `<table>`, callout).

**"Try it in the terminal" deep link:** the code block links to `/terminal?pulse=<base64url(code)>`. In `apps/web/app/terminal/page.tsx` (client), read the param once on mount, call the existing terminal-store pulse actions (`setPulseSource(activePaneId, code)` pattern at terminal-store.ts:505 — sets source + bumps `runToken`) plus open the Script dock, then `router.replace('/terminal')` to strip the URL. No server round-trip, no schema change; cookbook scripts are <1.5 KB so base64url in the query is safe.

**Tests** (Vitest in the existing `tests/` harness, importing source by relative path): `tests/docs-reference.test.ts` asserts `Object.keys(TA)`/`Object.keys(MATH)` ⊆ doc-entry keys AND runs every reference example through `runScript` on synthetic candles expecting zero errors; `tests/docs-cookbook.test.ts` runs all 10 strategies and asserts each produces ≥1 plot or mark.

**SEO:** `apps/web/app/sitemap.ts` + `apps/web/app/robots.ts` (App Router built-ins, no deps) covering /, /pricing, all /docs routes and cookbook slugs; `metadataBase` in `app/layout.tsx` switched to `process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL ?? 'http://localhost:3000'`; per-page `generateMetadata` (unique titles/descriptions, OpenGraph); JSON-LD `TechArticle` script tag on reference/cookbook pages; a `Docs` link added to the nav in `apps/web/components/site-header.tsx` (between Pricing and Terminal demo). All docs pages are pure-static output of `next build`.

increments.title: Increment 1 — /docs shell, shared-tokenizer highlighting, Getting started + Language tour, terminal deep link
increments.scope: Export `pulseStream` from apps/web/features/terminal/pulse-language.ts (one line). New: apps/web/features/docs/pulse-highlight.ts (static highlighter via highlightCode + classHighlighter over pulseStream.parser); apps/web/components/docs/pulse-code-block.tsx (highlighted pre, copy button client island, 'Run in terminal' link with base64url-encoded code), docs-sidebar.tsx, doc-prose.tsx; .pulse-code .tok-* palette block in apps/web/app/globals.css mirroring pulseHighlight hexes; apps/web/app/docs/layout.tsx, page.tsx (landing), getting-started/page.tsx, language/page.tsx (adapted from docs/pulsescript-language.md §1–§9/§12 + the Pine name map from docs/pulsescript-parity.md); ?pulse= param handler in apps/web/app/terminal/page.tsx using the existing store pulse actions then router.replace; Docs link in apps/web/components/site-header.tsx.
increments.verify: pnpm -F @supercharts/web typecheck clean. Browser on :3000: /docs and /docs/language render with sidebar; a code block shows ≥5 distinct token colors matching the editor palette (inspect .tok-* computed colors); click 'Run in terminal' on the Getting-started sample → /terminal opens with the Script dock showing exactly that code and it runs on live BTCUSDT; 0 console errors; screenshot. Existing suite still green (406/406 + any drift).

increments.title: Increment 2 — exhaustive API reference (ta. 61 / math. 24+3 / input. 6 / outputs), compiler + interpreter enforced
increments.scope: New typed content modules apps/web/features/docs/reference/ta.ts (TA_DOCS: Record<keyof typeof TA, DocEntry> — signature, params, return shape incl. record fields from TA[k].outputs, runnable example per function), reference/math.ts (24 fns + pi/e/phi), reference/inputs.ts (num/source/bool/text/select/color with control screenshots optional), reference/outputs.ts (draw line/steps/area/hist/dots/band/level/marker · paint bg/candles · mark buy/sell/note · alert · onTf · nz/na/text/parseNum/repeat/rgb/rgba). New pages apps/web/app/docs/reference/{ta,math,inputs,outputs}/page.tsx with grouped sections, per-function id anchors, sticky in-page TOC. New tests/docs-reference.test.ts: every stdlib key has an entry (fails if a future ta.* lands undocumented) and every example string executes through runScript on synthetic candles with no error.
increments.verify: Vitest: docs-reference.test green — report the actual asserted counts (expect 61 ta entries, 24 math fns) copy-pasted from the run. Negative check: temporarily delete one TA_DOCS entry → typecheck fails, restore. Browser: /docs/reference/ta deep-anchor (#supertrend) scrolls to the entry, record-field table renders .line/.dir, examples highlighted; screenshot. Typecheck all touched packages.

increments.title: Increment 3 — Backtesting/Optimizer docs, 10-strategy cookbook (interpreter-verified), SEO
increments.scope: apps/web/app/docs/backtesting/page.tsx documenting marks-as-strategy → POST /api/backtest/script (1000 real candles, fees/slippage/SL-TP realism) and POST /api/optimize/script (input.num sweep), plus the deliberate-differences section (no repaint, no random, strict bools). apps/web/features/docs/cookbook.ts with 10 strategies in new ergonomics (pulse 1, no-let, colon bodies): ema-cross-follower, rsi-mean-reversion, bollinger-squeeze-breakout, supertrend-flip, vwap-rvol-reclaim, donchian-breakout, macd-histogram-momentum, htf-trend-filter (onTf), atr-trailing-stop (persist), pivot-breakout. apps/web/app/docs/cookbook/page.tsx (card index) + cookbook/[slug]/page.tsx (generateStaticParams + generateMetadata, full script with Run-in-terminal + walkthrough). tests/docs-cookbook.test.ts runs all 10 via runScript asserting ≥1 mark/plot each. SEO: apps/web/app/sitemap.ts, robots.ts, metadataBase from NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL in app/layout.tsx, per-page generateMetadata + OpenGraph, JSON-LD TechArticle on reference/cookbook pages.
increments.verify: Vitest: docs-cookbook.test green (paste the 10-strategy pass output). pnpm -F @supercharts/web build succeeds and the route list shows all /docs pages as static (○), /docs/cookbook/[slug] SSG with 10 paths. Browser: a cookbook page's 'Run in terminal' loads and runs the strategy on live candles with marks visible; curl /sitemap.xml and /robots.txt return the routes; view-source shows unique title/description + JSON-LD on /docs/cookbook/ema-cross-follower; screenshot. Full suite green; live alerts/Telegram untouched (docs are read-only pages).

reuse: packages/script-lang/src (TA/MATH/MATH_CONSTS/KEYWORDS/BUILTIN_NAMES/PRICE_SOURCES exports as the single source of truth for reference keys; runScript for doc-example tests)
apps/web/features/terminal/pulse-language.ts (the one PulseScript tokenizer + color palette — docs highlighting must share it, never fork it)
@lezer/highlight classHighlighter/highlightCode (existing apps/web dependency — no new highlighter lib)
apps/web/components/site-header.tsx + site-footer.tsx + components/ui/* (public-page chrome, same pattern as app/pricing and app/s/[token])
apps/web/features/terminal/terminal-store.ts pulse actions (setPulseSource/runToken pattern + SAMPLE_PULSE) for the ?pulse= deep link — no parallel script-loading path
docs/pulsescript-language.md + docs/pulsescript-parity.md (prose source of truth to adapt, incl. the coming-from-Pine name map)
tests/ Vitest harness (relative-source imports) for docs-reference and docs-cookbook execution tests
apps/api routes POST /api/backtest/script and /api/optimize/script (documented as-is in the Backtesting page — no API changes)
